title: Bring back Automatic Dashboard Refreshing
excerpt: Charts in a dashboard used to refresh automatically which was very helpful, but with the new “upgraded dashboards”, the shortest cadence for refreshing is 15 minutes. Automatic refresh is listed but it won’t let me selec…

posts.author: BrookeHedges (Brooke Hedges)
posts.cookedHtml:
Charts in a dashboard used to refresh automatically which was very helpful, but with the new “upgraded dashboards”, the shortest cadence for refreshing is 15 minutes. Automatic refresh is listed but it won’t let me select it. If I “downgrade the dashboard” in settings, it will automatically refresh like it used to, but I lose out on some of the stacking bar chart functionality that they brought with the new update.

I use dashboards to track my team’s workload and capacity, so when I am changing around dates to even out capacities, I need to know how that is affecting their workload. I have to constantly refresh either the whole page or multiple charts in order to see the new numbers. Please bring automatic refreshing back!!
